skills.name: code-review
skills.description: Reviews code changes for quality, correctness, and style.
skills.content: Review the code diff and provide structured feedback.

skills.name: deploy
skills.description: Executes deployment pipelines for staging and production.
skills.content: Run the deployment steps according to the target environment.

skills.name: test-runner
skills.description: Discovers and runs test suites, reporting failures.
skills.content: Execute the test suite and report results with failure details.

skills.name: documentation
skills.content: Update documentation to reflect the current state of the codebase.
